subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath directed his steps toward the Ultimate Goal and hath attained unto the Most Exalted Horizon on the Day wherein the Call was raised [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن توجه الی المقصد الاقصی و فاز بالافق الاعلی فی یوم فیه نادی
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @presence of; reunion with God, @spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment
